EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} failed to view information about indexes in the table "{object.name}" in the database "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} failed to view information about the database "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} viewed information about the table "{object.value}" in the database "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} viewed information about indexes in the table "{object.name}" in the database "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} viewed information about the user {object.name} from the database "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} failed to drop the table "{object.name}" in the database "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} failed to view information about the user {object.name} from the database "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} failed to view information about the table "{object.value}" in the database "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} viewed the table "{object.name}" in the database "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} viewed information about the database "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} failed to view the table "{object.name}" in the database "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} dropped the table "{object.name}" in the database "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
